# MedinovAI Healthcare Service Requirements Template
# Production-ready Python dependencies for healthcare applications
# Version: 2.0.0
# Last Updated: September 26, 2025

# Core Web Framework
fastapi==0.104.1                    # Modern, fast web framework for building APIs
uvicorn[standard]==0.24.0           # ASGI server for FastAPI
gunicorn==21.2.0                    # WSGI HTTP Server for production

# Data Validation and Serialization
pydantic==2.5.0                     # Data validation using Python type hints
pydantic-settings==2.1.0            # Settings management for Pydantic

# HTTP Client
httpx==0.25.2                       # Async HTTP client for AI service integration
requests==2.31.0                    # HTTP library for synchronous requests

# Authentication and Security
python-jose[cryptography]==3.3.0    # JSON Web Token implementation
passlib[bcrypt]==1.7.4              # Password hashing library
cryptography==41.0.8                # Cryptographic recipes and primitives
python-multipart==0.0.6             # Form data parsing

# Database Connectivity
asyncpg==0.29.0                     # Async PostgreSQL adapter
psycopg2-binary==2.9.9              # PostgreSQL adapter (sync)
sqlalchemy==2.0.23                  # SQL toolkit and ORM
alembic==1.13.0                     # Database migration tool

# Caching and Session Management
redis==5.0.1                        # Redis client for caching
aioredis==2.0.1                     # Async Redis client

# Logging and Monitoring
structlog==23.2.0                   # Structured logging
prometheus-client==0.19.0           # Prometheus metrics client
opentelemetry-api==1.21.0           # OpenTelemetry API
opentelemetry-sdk==1.21.0           # OpenTelemetry SDK

# Healthcare-Specific Libraries
python-hl7==0.3.4                   # HL7 message parsing
fhir.resources==7.0.2               # FHIR resource models
pydicom==2.4.3                      # DICOM medical imaging

# Data Processing and Analysis
pandas==2.1.4                       # Data analysis and manipulation
numpy==1.25.2                       # Numerical computing
scipy==1.11.4                       # Scientific computing

# AI and Machine Learning
torch==2.1.1                        # PyTorch machine learning framework
transformers==4.36.0                # Hugging Face transformers
scikit-learn==1.3.2                 # Machine learning library
langchain==0.0.350                  # LLM application framework

# Date and Time Handling
python-dateutil==2.8.2              # Extensions to the standard datetime module
pytz==2023.3                        # World timezone definitions

# Configuration and Environment
python-dotenv==1.0.0                # Load environment variables from .env file
pyyaml==6.0.1                       # YAML parser and emitter

# Utilities
click==8.1.7                        # Command line interface creation kit
rich==13.7.0                        # Rich text and beautiful formatting
typer==0.9.0                        # CLI library based on type hints

# Development Dependencies (comment out for production)
# pytest==7.4.3                     # Testing framework
# pytest-asyncio==0.21.1            # Async testing support
# pytest-cov==4.1.0                 # Coverage plugin for pytest
# black==23.11.0                    # Code formatter
# isort==5.12.0                     # Import sorter
# flake8==6.1.0                     # Linting tool
# mypy==1.7.1                       # Static type checker
# pre-commit==3.6.0                 # Git hooks framework

# Production WSGI Server
gevent==23.9.1                      # Coroutine-based networking library

# Email and Notifications
emails==0.6                         # Email sending library
celery==5.3.4                       # Distributed task queue

# File Processing
pillow==10.1.0                      # Python Imaging Library
openpyxl==3.1.2                     # Excel file processing
python-magic==0.4.27                # File type identification

# Networking and Protocols
websockets==12.0                    # WebSocket client and server
paramiko==3.4.0                     # SSH2 protocol library

# Healthcare Compliance and Security
audit-log==0.1.0                    # Audit logging utilities
phi-anonymizer==1.0.0               # PHI anonymization tools

# Performance and Optimization
cachetools==5.3.2                   # Caching utilities
memory-profiler==0.61.0             # Memory usage monitoring

# Kubernetes and Container Integration
kubernetes==28.1.0                  # Kubernetes client library

# Version Pinning Notes:
# - All versions are pinned to ensure reproducible builds
# - Security patches should be applied regularly
# - Healthcare compliance requires stable, tested versions
# - AI/ML libraries may need GPU-specific versions in production

# Installation Commands:
# pip install -r requirements.txt
# pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

# Production Installation:
# pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Development Installation:
# pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt

# Security Scanning:
# pip-audit -r requirements.txt
# safety check -r requirements.txt

# Healthcare Compliance Notes:
# - All dependencies must be approved for healthcare use
# - Regular security updates are mandatory
# - HIPAA compliance validation required
# - FDA regulations may apply to AI/ML components
